text: What do you end up doing in Kashi?
Like when you go there because Banaras has become a travel dream for a lot of sadhaks.
When we go to Kashi, we see to it that we go to Manikarnika.
We just sit there. We go to Kashi Vaishanath.
And there are many temples in Kashi which are unexplored and I'm glad it should be that way.
And there are temples that you feel that yes, it is a portal.
A portal. It is a portal. Kashi is a portal.
